subcodes.first_line: O Thou kind Lord, Thou Who art independent of all things! These servants of Thine traversed mountains and deserts
subcodes.first_line_orig: مهربانا بی نیازا این بندگانت کوه و بیابان پیمودند و از دشت و دریا گذشتند
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for protection, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
